name: flow
description: Ticket pipeline. /flow <ticket> plans in plan mode (ExitPlanMode = the one gate), then enters a worktree and runs the autonomous implement→PR tail in the same session; background it (/bg) anytime to run unattended. You spec and review the draft PR. Multi-tracker engine (Jira | beads), pluggable per-stage handlers, compounding memory layer (reflect-stage extraction + plan-phase recall).
